R_100: 0,14,40,71,72,94,67,1,2,22,58,54,3,96,12,8,10,16,43,24,82,7,53,38,80,34,27,33,5,41,86,28,79,42,70,81,73,84,74,89,61,49,57,59,64,6,30,23,31,47,75,15,95,99,32,60,55,88,97,90,51,77,36,44,19,83,63,65,26,11,66,0|87,25,91,29,85,45,98,4,62,37,69,35,48,13,92,20,21,18,9,50,52,-1,46,93,78,76,17,56,68,39,100|4,5,6,8,9,14,19,20,23,27,31,36,39,45,47,50,51,53,55,60,70,-1,5,6,9,24,25,29,36,49,53|5,6,8,9,12,16,20,21,26,31,34,39,40,46,50,51,53,55,59,61,71,-1,6,9,10,25,29,30,39,53,55
